# kSecAttrCertificateType

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s certificate type.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrCertificateType: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and denotes the certificate type (see the `CSSM_CERT_TYPE` enumeration in cssmtype.h). Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassCertificate] have this attribute. Read only.
title: kSecAttrCertificateType
